item.title: Projects
item.description:
Web Apps

  • Library - (JavaScript, Python, Flask, MySQL)
  • Nettles Tire & Auto Svc. Center, LLC - responsive website for a small business (HTML, CSS, jQuery)
  • CoffeeBrew - (PHP 7, MySQL, jQuery)
  • FinancePro - (PHP 7, MySQL)
  • CD Collection - (PHP 7, MySQL)

REST APIs

  • Connections API - Archive for a popular word game (Python, Flask & SQLite) [API | Documentation]
  • Library API - Backend for Library app (Python, Flask & MySQL) [API | Documentation]

Various Apps

  • Omnivore JSON Merger - Script to merge Omnivore export files (Python)
  • Arch Install Scripts - Suite of scripts to install Arch Linux (Bash)
  • Discord Updater- Script to update Discord on Debian Linux and Debian-based distros
  • YouTubeMusic2CSV - Converts Youtube Music playlists to CSV files (Python)
  • TikTok backup suite - Suite of scripts to rename downloaded videos, write filenames to CSV, and merge the CSV to a Notion database (Python)
